module_handover.implementation_summary: cmd_preflight(args) 함수를 pipeline.py에 추가 (cmd_codex 직후, _set_external_gate 직전). argparse에 "preflight" 서브파서 등록 (p_codex 블록 직후). COMMAND_MAP에 "preflight": cmd_preflight 추가. preflight_report.json 생성: schema_version=1, pipeline_id, generated_at, related_files, recent_pipelines_same_file, tool_facts(ruff_rules_verified/ruff_rules_not_found), build_required, build_reason, writer_reader_pairs.
